summary: Onboarding Hub and TOS acceptance features tested - ALL 6 backend tests PASS and frontend UI verified. Unified Onboarding Hub shows all 7 action cards for super_admin. Terms/Privacy pages have new sections for contact data handling, data transfer, and SMS compliance. Change-password endpoint correctly accepts tos_accepted field.

issues: Partner/Reseller card uses 'handshake' icon which is not valid for Ionicons family - shows question mark icon instead

action_items: MINOR: Fix Partner/Reseller icon in onboarding-hub.tsx - change 'handshake' to a valid Ionicons name (e.g., 'people-circle', 'briefcase', or 'business')
critical_code_review_comments: onboarding-hub.tsx: ACTIONS array correctly defines 7 onboarding action cards with role-based visibility
onboarding-hub.tsx line 115: visibleActions correctly filters by user role
onboarding-hub.tsx line 65: 'handshake' icon for partner_onboard is NOT valid Ionicons name (shows ? icon)
change-password.tsx lines 35-36: tosViewed and tosAccepted state variables correctly manage TOS flow
change-password.tsx lines 68-71: Validation requires tosAccepted for first-time password changes
change-password.tsx lines 269-332: TOS acceptance UI correctly conditional on isFirstTimeChange
auth.py lines 587-589: Backend correctly stores tos_accepted and tos_accepted_at on password change
terms.tsx: 16 sections total including new sections 7-10 (Contact Data, Data Ownership, Data Transfer, SMS Terms)
privacy.tsx: 12 sections total including new sections 3 (Contact Data Storage) and 7 (Data Transfer)
admin/index.tsx lines 345-351: Onboarding Hub link correctly placed in Customer Infrastructure section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding Hub and TOS acceptance features fully tested. Admin dashboard shows 'Onboarding Hub' link under Customer Infrastructure section. Onboarding Hub page displays 7 action cards for super_admin role (New Org & Store, Add Store, Add Team, Individual, Partner, White Label, Internal Employee). TOS acceptance section on change-password page is conditional on user.needs_password_change=true. Backend stores tos_accepted and tos_accepted_at when changing password with tos_accepted=true.

features_verified.admin_onboarding_hub_link: PASS - /admin shows 'Onboarding Hub' link in Customer Infrastructure section
features_verified.onboarding_hub_7_cards: PASS - /admin/onboarding-hub shows all 7 action cards for super_admin
features_verified.onboarding_hub_guide: PASS - Collapsible 'Setup Wizard Quick-Reference Guide' expands to show 7-step wizard + After Setup
features_verified.terms_page_sections_7_10: PASS - /imos/terms has sections 7 (Contact Data), 8 (Data Ownership), 9 (Data Transfer), 10 (SMS Terms)
features_verified.privacy_page_sections_3_7: PASS - /imos/privacy has sections 3 (Contact Data Storage) and 7 (Data Transfer)
features_verified.backend_tos_stored: PASS - Backend stores tos_accepted and tos_accepted_at in user record
features_verified.change_password_tos_ui: PASS - TOS section conditionally shown for first-time users (needs_password_change=true)
